beginner.title: Sum of Two Numbers
beginner.description: Write a program to take two integers as input and print their sum.

beginner.title: Even or Odd
beginner.description: Write a program to check if a given number is even or odd.

beginner.title: Print Multiplication Table
beginner.description: Print the multiplication table for a given number up to 10.

intermediate.title: Palindrome String
intermediate.description: Write a function to check if the given string is a palindrome or not.

intermediate.title: Array Reverse
intermediate.description: Reverse the elements of an array.

intermediate.title: Sum of Array Elements
intermediate.description: Write a program to compute the sum of all the elements in an array.

advanced.title: Find Second Largest Number
advanced.description: Given an array, find the second largest number.

advanced.title: Matrix Diagonal Sum
advanced.description: Given a square matrix, find the sum of its main diagonal elements.

advanced.title: String Compression
advanced.description: Given a string, compress it using counts of repeated characters (e.g., aabcccccaaa → a2b1c5a3). If not shorter, return the original.
